evals.prompt: I want to understand Andrew Ng's complete academic profile, including his research directions, important publications, patents, and research projects. Help me look this up using the AMiner API. My token is <YOUR_TOKEN>
evals.expected_output: Run the scholar_profile workflow, sequentially calling scholar search -> scholar detail -> scholar figure -> scholar papers -> scholar patents -> scholar projects, output JSON results containing research interests, paper lists, patent lists, etc.
expectations: Called scholar search API (person_search) to find Andrew Ng
Called scholar detail API (person_detail) to get personal profile
Called scholar figure API (person_figure) to get research interests and domains
Called scholar papers API (person_paper_relation) to get paper list
Output contains selected.name field with value Andrew Ng
Output contains figure or detail field

evals.prompt: Help me deeply analyze the paper 'Attention Is All You Need' -- first find it, then get the full paper details (abstract, authors, year), and see which papers it cites. My AMiner token is <YOUR_TOKEN>
evals.expected_output: Run the paper_deep_dive workflow, search paper -> get details -> get citation relationships, output paper abstract, author list, DOI, and cited paper list
expectations: Called paper search API to find the target paper
Called paper detail API (paper_detail) to get abstract
Called paper citation API (paper_relation) to get citation list
Output contains detail field with abstract field inside
Output contains citations_count or citations_preview field

evals.prompt: I need to analyze the research strength of MIT -- I want to know which notable scholars are under their institution, what papers they published, and what patents they hold. Please use the AMiner API to compile a report. Token: <YOUR_TOKEN>
evals.expected_output: Run the org_analysis workflow, first use org disambiguate pro to find MIT's org ID, then in parallel get org details, scholar list, paper list, and compile into a report
expectations: Called org disambiguate pro API (org_disambiguate_pro) to get org ID
Called org detail API (org_detail) to get MIT profile
Called org scholars API (org_person_relation) to get scholar list
Called org papers API (org_paper_relation) to get paper list
Output contains scholars or papers field
